revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:速川神社]]
'''Hayakawa Shrine''' (速川神社) refers to several Shinto shrines.
* '''Hayakawa Shrine''' - A {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} located in {{ill|Etchū Province|ja|Etchū Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etchū Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Imizu District, Toyama|en|Imizu District, Toyama|qid=Q6004195|lt=Imizu District|1=Imizu District, Toyama}}. ''' '''{{ill|Hayakawa Shrine (Himi)|ja|速川神社 (氷見市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayakawa Shrine (Himi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}''' - A proposed site of the above. Located in Himi City, Toyama Prefecture. ''' '''{{ill|Hayakawa Shrine (Takaoka)|ja|速川神社 (高岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayakawa Shrine (Takaoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}''' - Another proposed site of the above. Located in Takaoka City, Toyama Prefecture. ''' '''{{ill|Hayakawa Hachiman Shrine|ja|早川八幡社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayakawa Hachiman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}''' - Another related shrine. Located in Takaoka City, Toyama Prefecture. * '''{{ill|Hayakawa Shrine (Saito)|ja|速川神社 (西都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayakawa Shrine (Saito)|qq=}}''' - Located in Saito City, Miyazaki Prefecture.
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|速川神社|version=40514071|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:速川神社]]
